Context Propagation System (CPS)

Canonical site: https://contextpropagationsystem.com/
Summary: CPS is an exploratory continuity and social-memory system for authored artificial worlds. It focuses on memory persistence, information propagation, lineage, containment, and observability.

Primary pages:
- Home: https://contextpropagationsystem.com/
- How It Works: https://contextpropagationsystem.com/how-does-it-work.html
- Use Cases: https://contextpropagationsystem.com/use-cases.html
- Development Journal: https://contextpropagationsystem.com/blog.html
- Contact: https://contextpropagationsystem.com/contact.html

Topics:
- social memory
- continuity systems
- artificial worlds
- authored simulations
- information propagation
- lineage and observability
- AI-supported narrative systems

Author:
- Wojciech Hupert
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/wojciechhupert/
- Studio: https://shapeseeds.com
